case_title: GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A CALIF. LIMITED PART. vs. TRISULO, ARYA PRABOWO L. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A CALIF. LIMITED PART. AS TO DEFENDANT TRISULO, ARYA PRABOWO L.
